title: Promotional countdown timer may be stuck at 00:00:00
description: A countdown timer in the promo banner reads 00:00:00. This could be a genuinely-expired evergreen timer (deceptive urgency) or a transient load-state captured before hydration. Two judges disagreed.

visualGate.reason: Judge A read the timer as a live evergreen timer stuck at zero (deceptive). Judge B noted the surrounding banner text still referenced a future date and flagged a possible pre-hydration capture. Confidence split, routed to review.

rubricVerdicts.discrepancy: Timer value 00:00:00 with no observed decrement during the capture window.
